bullets: Improved frontend load time by ~30% by developing a home-layout planning SaaS platform with React.js, Node.js and Express.js, exposing 15+ REST API endpoints.
Accelerated feature delivery and cut code duplication by building 20+ reusable React components and modular backend services within an Agile/Scrum team.
Reduced pre-release integration defects by creating and executing 50+ API and UI test cases in Postman covering critical user flows.
